div1.entryFree: Expostulate, to discuss, to speak, to converse: the time now serves not to e. Gentl. III, 1, 251. stay not to e., make speed, H6C II, 5, 135. more bitterly could I e. R3 III, 7, 192. to e. what majesty should be, Hml. II, 2, 86. I'll not e. with her, lest her body and beauty unprovide my mind again, Oth. IV, 1, 217.
